function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0004
alias: northstar_design_partner_sprint
issued_on: 2026-01-17
total_eur: 890
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 650
    line_eur: 650
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar design-partner workflow sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                         |
| invoice_number | INV-0004                        |
| alias          | northstar_design_partner_sprint |
| issued_on      | 2026-01-17                      |
| total_eur      | 890                             |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH   |
| project        | Northstar Ledger                |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                  |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 650      | 650      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 890      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of the half-product, half-services invoices that keeps testing the boundary between startup work and bespoke delivery.

function.message: Done. I worked the oldest inbox message by OCR-structuring `50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md` into invoice YAML frontmatter (including required fields and line items) while preserving the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, then deleted the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.

function.outcome_justification: Evidence in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for the specified invoice. The schema in `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md` defined required invoice fields and line format, and the target invoice content provided all visible values. I updated that file accordingly and then removed the processed inbox item per `00_inbox/AGENTS.MD` and `99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md`.
